# Vane Data Documentation Index

Generated from docs/manifest.json. Routes are listed in sidebar order.

- /docs/data: Overview.
- /docs/data/quickstart/installation: Installation.
- /docs/data/quickstart/quickstart: Quickstart.
- /docs/data/concepts/sql-vs-python: SQL vs Python.
- /docs/data/concepts/udfs: UDFs.
- /docs/data/concepts/ai-functions: AI Functions.
- /docs/data/examples: Examples.
- /docs/data/examples/training-data-pipeline: Training Data Pipeline.
- /docs/data/examples/insurance-document-audit: Insurance Document Audit.
- /docs/data/examples/tender-compliance-check: Tender Compliance Check.
- /docs/data/examples/multimodal-data-lake: Multimodal Data Lake.
- /docs/data/deploy/deployment: Deployment.
- /docs/data/contributing/development: Development.
